ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bike_rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental record */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the rental */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the year (1-4) */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Whether the day is a holiday (0/1) */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Whether the day is a working day (0/1) */,
  "weather" INTEGER /* Weather condition (1-4) */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Apparent temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "casual" INTEGER /* Number of casual users */,
  "registered" INTEGER /* Number of registered users */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (0-23) */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike was rented */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike rented */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., casual, registered) */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance traveled in kilometers */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Detailed weather description */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bike_status ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_holiday FOREIGN KEY ("holiday") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_weather FOREIGN KEY ("weather") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Winter, Spring, Summer, Fall) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "is_public_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the holiday is a public holiday (0/1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition (e.g., Sunny, Cloudy, Rainy, Snowy) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index */,
  "visibility_km" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed weather description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, registered user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active (0/1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was rented */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was returned */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike rented */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike was rented */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance traveled in kilometers */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bike_status ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rentals_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_status" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bike (e.g., available, rented, maintenance) */,
  "last_rental_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was last rented */,
  "bike_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike model */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was last in maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the bike is due for next maintenance */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_status_bike_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_model_id") REFERENCES bike_models ("bike_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_types" (
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike type */,
  "bike_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike type (e.g., road bike, mountain bike, hybrid bike) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bike type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_models" (
  "bike_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike model */,
  "bike_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike model */,
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bike model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_models_bike_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_type_id") REFERENCES bike_types ("bike_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station (number of bikes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the station */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station is active (0/1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike was rented */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was rented */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike rented */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance traveled in kilometers */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_logs_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bike_status ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_logs_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES bike_rentals ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
